brief: Improve Provider Studio so Codex Desktop exposes a visible provider/model switching surface instead of only CLI/bridge files. Continue in /home/yun/tmp/codex-app-in-linux on branch feature/provider-studio-wave1. Preserve app launch. Prefer safe source-level or wrapper-level UI integration over brittle generated bundle mutation. Verify either a visible UI surface with provider/model switching evidence or a clearly proven source boundary plus the closest safe installed surface. Keep secrets redacted; no real provider credentials; use mock providers for tests. Do not push until verified.
gjcObjective: Complete the durable ultragoal plan in .gjc/ultragoal/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .gjc/ultragoal/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.
